docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMYJ,MATT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLD TECHNOLOGY, LLC, A CAL/LIMITED LIABILITY CO.
